name: Resideo Technologies, Inc.
description: Resideo Technologies, Inc. is a leading global manufacturer and distributor of technology-driven products and solutions for home comfort, security, and energy management. The company provides a wide range of connected devices, including smart thermostats, air quality monitors, and security systems, designed to simplify home life and improve efficiency. With a history rooted in over 130 years of innovation, Resideo serves millions of homes worldwide through its diverse portfolio of brands. The company operates through two primary segments: Products and Solutions, and ADI Global Distribution, focusing on creating sustainable, safe, and comfortable living environments for customers globally.
